page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.u2a server family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a thread-per-core ratio of 1.0, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing across threads.

The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. This 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio aligns with standard general-purpose resource distributions. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its dedicated AMD EPYC cores, balanced memory allocation, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, this server is designed for workloads requiring stable, non-shared CPU execution. Suitable use cases include enterprise application hosting, web serving, containerized microservices, and general-purpose database workloads that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.16xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.25 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage solutions. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The balanced resource allocation makes this instance suitable for multi-threaded enterprise applications, web serving, and general-purpose workloads requiring consistent CPU performance.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core AMD EPYC platform featuring balanced memory allocation and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise workloads.
